languages.text: "Я выразил вам уважение, как враг врагу, дозволив вам право на последнее слово. И я разочарован". {n}Тон Себериана становится ровным, словно вся эта ситуация его утомила.{/n} "Полагаю, я выполнил минимум, которого требует этикет. Стража, расстреляйте их".

"I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."
languages.original_text: "Я выразил вам уважение, как враг врагу, дозволив вам право на последнее слово. И я разочарован". {n}Тон Себериана становится ровным, словно вся эта ситуация его утомила.{/n} "Полагаю, я выполнил минимум, которого требует этикет. Стража, расстреляйте их".

traits.locale_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

"I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

"I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

languages.text: “我以对手之礼相待，还给了你说遗言的机会。结果，可真叫我失望啊。”{n}塞贝里安的语调变得平淡，仿佛这整件事已让他生厌。{/n}“我想，我已经尽到了最基本的礼数。卫兵，开枪。”
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: “我以对手之礼相待，还给了你说遗言的机会。结果，可真叫我失望啊。”{n}塞贝里安的语调变得平淡，仿佛这整件事已让他生厌。{/n}“我想，我已经尽到了最基本的礼数。卫兵，开枪。”

languages.text: « Je vous ai {mf|traité|traitée} avec le respect que l'on doit à ses ennemis, et je vous ai {mf|laissé|laissée} plaider votre cause, mais, au risque de vous décevoir, je ne suis pas convaincu. » {n}Seberian s'exprime désormais d'un ton monocorde, comme si cette situation dans son ensemble l'ennuyait à mourir.{/n} « Sur ce, il me semble avoir rempli mes obligations minimales en termes d'étiquette. Gardes, abattez-les. »
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous ai {mf|traité|traitée} avec le respect que l'on doit à ses ennemis, et je vous ai {mf|laissé|laissée} plaider votre cause, mais, au risque de vous décevoir, je ne suis pas convaincu. » {n}Seberian s'exprime désormais d'un ton monocorde, comme si cette situation dans son ensemble l'ennuyait à mourir.{/n} « Sur ce, il me semble avoir rempli mes obligations minimales en termes d'étiquette. Gardes, abattez-les. »

languages.text: "Seni düşman olarak görmeme rağmen sana saygıyla yaklaşıp son sözünü söyleme şansı tanıdım. Fakat büyük hayal kırıklığına uğradım." {n}Seberian'ın ses tonu, sanki mevcut durumdan ölesiye sıkılmış gibi hissizleşiyor.{/n} "Görgü kuralları doğrultusunda asgari yükümlülüklerimi yerine getirdiğime inanıyorum. Muhafızlar, hepsini vurun."
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: "Seni düşman olarak görmeme rağmen sana saygıyla yaklaşıp son sözünü söyleme şansı tanıdım. Fakat büyük hayal kırıklığına uğradım." {n}Seberian'ın ses tonu, sanki mevcut durumdan ölesiye sıkılmış gibi hissizleşiyor.{/n} "Görgü kuralları doğrultusunda asgari yükümlülüklerimi yerine getirdiğime inanıyorum. Muhafızlar, hepsini vurun."

languages.text: «Le he tratado con respeto, de enemigo a enemig{mf|o|a}, y le he dejado expresar sus últimas palabras. Son decepcionantes». {n}Seberian adopta un tono impasible, como si le aburriera la situación.{/n} «Creo que he cumplido con las exigencias de la etiqueta. Guardias, fuego a discreción».
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: «Le he tratado con respeto, de enemigo a enemig{mf|o|a}, y le he dejado expresar sus últimas palabras. Son decepcionantes». {n}Seberian adopta un tono impasible, como si le aburriera la situación.{/n} «Creo que he cumplido con las exigencias de la etiqueta. Guardias, fuego a discreción».

languages.text: "Ich habe Euch mit Respekt behandelt, von Feind zu Feind, und Euch ermöglicht, einige letzten Worte zu sprechen. Und nun bin ich alles andere als begeistert." {n}Seberian klingt mittlerweile, als würde ihn die ganze Situation langweilen.{/n} "Ich denke, ich bin meiner Pflicht hinsichtlich der Etikette hinreichend nachgekommen. Wachen, erschießt sie."
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Euch mit Respekt behandelt, von Feind zu Feind, und Euch ermöglicht, einige letzten Worte zu sprechen. Und nun bin ich alles andere als begeistert." {n}Seberian klingt mittlerweile, als würde ihn die ganze Situation langweilen.{/n} "Ich denke, ich bin meiner Pflicht hinsichtlich der Etikette hinreichend nachgekommen. Wachen, erschießt sie."

languages.text: 「私は君を敵として敬意を払い、最後の言葉を述べる機会を与えた。だが、私は失望している。」{n}シベリアンの口調は平坦になり、この状況全体に退屈を感じているようである。{/n}「私は礼儀に最低限の義務を果たしたと考える。衛兵、撃て。」
languages.original_text: "I treated you with respect, one foe to another, and gave you the chance to speak your last. And I find myself underwhelmed." {n}Seberian's tone becomes flat, as if this entire situation has bored him.{/n} "I believe I have fulfilled my minimal obligations to etiquette. Guards, shoot them."

traits.locale_text: 「私は君を敵として敬意を払い、最後の言葉を述べる機会を与えた。だが、私は失望している。」{n}シベリアンの口調は平坦になり、この状況全体に退屈を感じているようである。{/n}「私は礼儀に最低限の義務を果たしたと考える。衛兵、撃て。」
